name: rinawarp-terminal-pro
description: RinaWarp agent-first desktop app for build, test, deploy, and system workflows
author: RinaWarp Team <team@rinawarptech.com>

scripts.build:electron: npm run check:ipc && npm run build:preload && tsc -b tsconfig.json && node scripts/copy-static.mjs
scripts.test:ipc: npm run build:electron && playwright test tests/e2e/rina-ipc-full-smoke.test.ts -c tests/playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:playwright: npm run build:electron && playwright test -c tests/playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:playwright:headed: npm run build:electron && playwright test -c tests/playwright.config.ts --headed
scripts.test:playwright:ci: CI=1 npm run build:electron && playwright test -c tests/playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:playwright:smoke: npm run build:electron && playwright test rina-tools.smoke.spec.ts smoke.electron.spec.ts -c tests/playwright.config.ts --workers=4
scripts.test:playwright:ipc: npm run build:electron && playwright test rina-ipc -c tests/playwright.config.ts --workers=4
scripts.test:playwright:tools: npm run build:electron && playwright test rina-tools -c tests/playwright.config.ts --workers=4
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:playwright
scripts.release:readiness: npm run build:electron && npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e:proof && npm run test:e2e:conversation && npm run test:trust-smoke && playwright test tests/e2e/smoke.electron.spec.ts tests/e2e/settings.spec.ts tests/e2e/marketplace.spec.ts tests/e2e/visual-qa.spec.ts tests/e2e/updates.spec.ts tests/e2e/release-golden-journeys.spec.ts -c tests/playwright.config.ts --reporter=line
scripts.dev:terminal: cross-env RINAWARP_DEV=1 npm run continuous-smoke && npm run dev
scripts.e2e:smoke: unset FORCE_COLOR && unset NO_COLOR && unset ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE && npm run build:electron && playwright test -c tests/playwright.config.ts
scripts.e2e:smoke:headed: unset FORCE_COLOR && unset NO_COLOR && unset ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE && npm run build:electron && playwright test -c tests/playwright.config.ts --headed
scripts.dev: unset ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE && npm run build:electron && npx electron .
scripts.build:all: npm run build:electron && npm run package:linux && npm run package:win
